zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Southwell V於大約1363年出生在英國越可爾費利申吉可時，他的父親John de Southwell IV30歲，母親Margaret de Filliol31歲。他於大約1393年與Agnes Samon在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國越可爾費利吉可 煙雨 波爾特比。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Southwell V was born about 1363, in Feliskirk, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Southwell IV, was 30 and his mother, Margaret de Filliol, was 31. He married Agnes Samon about 1393, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Felixkirk with Boltby, Yorkshire, England.

Il a épousé Agnes Samon environ 1393, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Felixkirk with Boltby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Southwell Vが約1363年にイギリスヨークシュアイアフエリスキルクで生まれた時，父John de Southwell IVは30歳，母Margaret de Filliolは31歳であった。約1393年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでAgnes Samonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスヨークシュアイアフエリクスキルク ウィス ボルトビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Southwell V(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 요르크실르 펠리스커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Southwell IV(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Filliol(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 Agnes Samon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 요르크실르 펠릭스커크 위스 볼트비에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Southwell V родился около 1363 г. в местности фелискирк, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Southwell IV было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Filliol, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Samon около 1393 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности феликскирк вит болтби, еркшир, Англия.
